title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 33
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about lost wallet.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you found your wallet? You looked worried earlier. || Boy: Not at first. I searched the café table because I remembered using it there, then checked the school office, but nobody had seen it. || Girl: So where did it turn up? || Boy: My friend has just messaged me. [1]It is inside my library bag[/1]. I must have left it there. I will collect it at lunch because I need it for buying lunch. || Girl: Great. You can stop searching now and concentrate on the day.
items.question: Where is the wallet?
items.explanation: The speaker says the wallet is inside their library bag.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about buying a birthday present.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you buy a birthday present for my cousin? You said you were going into town after school. || Man: Yes, but choosing took a while. I first considered a T-shirt, because that seemed a safe choice. || Woman: What about cinema tickets? That might have been useful. || Man: I looked at that, but it did not seem right. In the end, [2]I bought a board game because we can all play it together[/2]. || Woman: That sounds thoughtful. I am sure it will be appreciated. || Man: I hope so. I will wrap it this evening before tomorrow's party.
items.question: What did the speaker buy?
items.explanation: The speaker says they bought a board game because we can all play it together.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at the café.
items.audio_script: Girl: What job are you doing at the café this afternoon? I thought you were going to wash the dishes. || Boy: That was yesterday's plan, but somebody finished it before lunch. || Girl: So will you make sandwiches instead? || Boy: No, the manager says that is not needed today. [3]I have to set the outside tables because a group is arriving for lunch[/3]. || Girl: That sounds manageable, although you may be busy. || Boy: Yes, I want to finish before five because I promised to meet my friends afterwards nearby.
items.question: What job will the speaker do?
items.explanation: The speaker says they have to set the outside tables because a group is arriving for lunch.

items.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on the art lesson.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are you ready for the art lesson tomorrow? I was checking what we have to bring, because I do not want to forget anything. || Boy: I was going to pack a ruler. Do we need that? || Girl: No, it is not on the list. || Boy: Perhaps I should take some coloured paper instead. || Girl: You can, but [4]everyone must bring an apron because the class will be painting with messy colours[/4]. || Boy: Thanks for reminding me. I will put it in my bag tonight, so I am ready when we leave.
items.question: What must the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone must bring an apron because the class will be painting with messy colours.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still planning to go swimming on Saturday? I had already arranged everything for it. || Man: I am afraid not. The pool is closed and the courts are fully booked, so that plan will not work now. || Woman: We could play tennis instead. Would that be easier? || Man: I thought about that, but I have a better idea. [5]Let us go ice skating on Saturday instead[/5]. || Woman: Fine with me. Where shall we meet? || Man: Meet me by the bus stop at four, and bring your student card in case they ask for it.
items.question: What will they do?
items.explanation: The speaker suggests that they go ice skating on Saturday instead.

items.context: You hear two students talking about choir rehearsal.
items.audio_script: Girl: Do you know where choir rehearsal is being held today? I was going to the music room, where we usually meet. || Boy: Do not go there. The piano is being repaired and lunch tables are still out, so the organiser changed the room. || Girl: I wondered whether it might be in the dining hall. || Boy: No, that is not right either. [6]We need to meet in the school hall this afternoon[/6]. || Girl: Thanks for telling me. I would have waited in the wrong place. || Boy: I will message the others too, so nobody misses the beginning.
items.question: Where will choir rehearsal be held?
items.explanation: The speaker says they need to meet in the school hall.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a journey.
items.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the sports centre tomorrow? I thought you were travelling by bicycle. || Man: I had planned to, but my bicycle light is broken and a taxi costs too much. || Woman: Could you go by taxi instead? It might be quicker. || Man: No, that costs too much. [7]I am going by bus because it stops outside the main entrance[/7]. || Woman: That sounds sensible. I will meet you there when you arrive. || Man: Good. I will message you if the journey takes longer than expected.
items.question: How will the speaker get to the sports centre?
items.explanation: The speaker says they are going by bus because it stops outside the main entrance.
